title: Bridge Paper: Synchrony Across Brains.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Intersubjectivity — second-person neuroscience, embodied empathy, shared intentionality, social predictive processing.
**Phase context:** intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, predictive processing social cognition, shared intentionality, second-person neuroscience

Paper: Synchrony Across Brains.
DOI: 10.1146/annurev-psych-080123-101149
Abstract: Second-person neuroscience focuses on studying the behavioral and neuronal mechanisms of real-time social interactions within single and across interacting brains. In this review article, we describe the developments that have been undertaken to study socially interactive phenomena and the behavioral and neurobiological processes that extend across interaction partners. More specifically, we focus on the role that synchrony across brains plays in enabling and facilitating social interaction and
